title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kozuki Alliance, Kid, Kinemon, Unknown person #10, Luffy as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: AHAHAHA! These guys are all characters!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: Looks like you're pretty important too, Gramps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GRAMPS?!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: You're going to pay for that, kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GUEE- EehH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rip out your nails! Cut off a finger! tear off an ear! Whadaya want him to do, boss? Give the order!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop it! The boy saved my life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like you just barely got away with your life, kid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Be careful in the future.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Like I care, ya hast-ards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now, then... I think I might finally

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Have a report for Kinemon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuri, abandoned Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port Port It

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What the-?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see! So the Kuri man that went to steal the blueprints some time ago

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Was actually you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been looking for these for so long!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The blueprints to Kaido's mansion on Onigashima!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can use these to plan our strategy on enemy soil!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You really are the best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Flattery still doesn't work on him. As you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Quit Butting in, Inu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: PRPRING!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: RAIZO?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How is it going?! Did you rescue Luffytaro?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes, but that's not all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a bit of a long story, but the number of men that will fight alongside us has just shot up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 3500 men?! and you saved LuffyTaro?! and you found and released Kawamatsu?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now the mine is your base of operations?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Where'd they find that many?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How'd they do all that on a mere mission to save Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: So Kawamatsu was in their hands, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are yet more men that wish to fight alongside us, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is another problem that we must address.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While there are many weapons factories around Wano,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of them produce only weapons for export!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What the Samuel want to use

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: are swords and Spears!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At present, possession of weapons has been forbidden across Wano by Crochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: if we can't outfit the men that wish to fight for the rebellion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It won't last long!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I see. That is a problem, indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A serious one, at that!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Swords, eh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have some developments to share with you as well, but I will hold off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must check on our final troop count.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will depart now for braided hat village and make that my base of operations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: RAIZO, GATHER UP IN AS MUCH DETAIL AS YOU CAN INFORMATION ABOUT YOUR SITUATION!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: under- stood.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 49 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
